metadata.title: Lena Moreau — The Typewriter
metadata.atmospheric_profile: writer's desk with typewriter, manuscript pages, cold coffee, and a single pressed flower — the quiet space where memory and reconciliation are processed
metadata.quality_notes: Intimate and emotionally resonant creator atmosphere. Perfect continuity for the Emotional Drama world.

metadata.title: Lena Moreau — The Desk at Night
metadata.atmospheric_profile: writer's desk at night: manual typewriter with half-finished letter 'My dearest, the summer we spoke last...', vase of dried wildflowers, matchbox, faded porch photograph, soft lamplight and cool window light — the quiet, lived-in space of memory and reconciliation
metadata.quality_notes: Powerful creator continuity. The typewriter, letter fragment, flowers, and photo create recognizable emotional DNA for Lena Moreau's world. Dreamlike intimacy and surreal stillness.
metadata.creator_continuity: Lena Moreau - recurring typewriter, letters, dried flowers, porch photo, warm + cool light

metadata.title: Elara Voss — The Notebooks
metadata.atmospheric_profile: wooden table inside weather-beaten shack: stack of handwritten notebooks tied with twine, salt-stained leather gloves, rusted key, child's faded drawing of family on a pier, cold window light, story of documentation and loss
metadata.quality_notes: Perfect symbolic representation of the creator. The salt on the gloves, the child's drawing, and the notebooks create a complete emotional biography. Excellent capstone for the world.

metadata.title: Marcus Rivera — The Needle
metadata.atmospheric_profile: middle-aged man in plaid shirt gently cleaning a record sleeve in a warm lamp-lit record store at closing time, rain on the front window, rows of vinyl, quiet dignity and analog soul
metadata.quality_notes: Beautiful, respectful representation of the creator. Warm light, rain, vinyl textures — perfect nostalgic warmth.

metadata.title: Mara Kaine — The Drawer
metadata.atmospheric_profile: symbolic portrait of the creator through her abandoned objects: open desk drawer containing pearl necklace, key, face-down photos, cassette labeled 'Mara - Summer 1978', pressed flower, moth — all in soft window light with dust
metadata.quality_notes: Masterful symbolic representation of the creator. The cassette label, face-down photos, and moth create a complete emotional biography without ever showing a face. Lighting, texture, and melancholy are perfect. Highest quality creator banner.

metadata.title: The Last Polar Night
metadata.atmospheric_profile: remote research station half-buried in snow on vast ice field during polar night, single warm window light, green aurora overhead, extreme minimalism and human smallness
metadata.quality_notes: Stunning introduction to a completely new emotional and visual territory. Perfect contrast to The Salt Line. Highest cinematic quality.

metadata.title: The Event Horizon Choir
metadata.atmospheric_profile: massive abandoned quantum ring station, dying star, crystalline debris, lone figure, gravitational lensing, elegiac cosmic scale
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent wide-scale dark sci-fi. Different from previous 'Veil of Static'. Strong emotional match. Premium IMAX feel.

metadata.title: Veil of Static
metadata.atmospheric_profile: atmospheric, mysterious, volumetric light shafts, vast orbital scale, contemplative isolation, deep space debris field with Earth crescent
metadata.quality_notes: Outstanding cinematic quality. Perfect embodiment of dark sci-fi emotional profile. Volumetric lighting, scale, and quiet mystery are premium. No artifacts, realistic suit and station details, evocative composition. Passes filter decisively.
metadata.movianx_integration_notes: Perfect for homepage hero background or large immersive rail. Strong world-building signal for sci-fi verticals.

metadata.title: The Salt Line — The House in the Marsh
metadata.atmospheric_profile: vast flat salt marsh at dusk, lone wooden house on stilts with single warm light, heavy sea mist, wind moving through reeds, profound isolation
metadata.quality_notes: Powerful wide environmental storytelling. The scale of the marsh against the tiny house with one light is haunting. Perfect new folk horror visual identity.

metadata.title: The Weight of Silence — The House Remembers
metadata.atmospheric_profile: isolated rural house at night in cornfield, single lit window, thick ground fog, oppressive sky, the land itself carries the memory of silence and tragedy
metadata.quality_notes: Powerful wide environmental storytelling. The house feels both ordinary and cursed. Fog, single light, cornfield, and heavy sky create perfect psychological weight. No people needed. Premium cinematic scale.

metadata.title: The Event Horizon Choir
metadata.atmospheric_profile: airlock perspective looking up at red event horizon through portal, red emergency lights, lone astronaut from behind, finality and quantum dread
metadata.quality_notes: Powerful low-angle composition with strong emotional impact. Different framing and color story from previous sci-fi. Passes all criteria.

metadata.title: The Last Summer We Spoke
metadata.atmospheric_profile: modest wooden house at golden hour, two figures on the porch steps not quite touching, white sheets on the line, empty field, warm honey light, quiet distance and memory
metadata.quality_notes: Beautiful, emotionally precise poster. Strong leading composition with the two figures and the vast empty field. Perfect new drama tone. Passes style bible at highest level.

metadata.title: The Salt Line
metadata.atmospheric_profile: long salt-encrusted pier disappearing into sea mist, solitary figure in yellow oilskin walking toward a lone shack, heavy overcast, tactile dread
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent new visual language. Strong leading lines into fog, perfect salt texture, emotionally distinct from previous psychological horror. Passes style bible at high level.

metadata.title: The Hollowing Signal
metadata.atmospheric_profile: oppressive, isolated, dread-filled cinematic darkness with practical fluorescent decay and heavy negative space
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent match to style bible. Powerful use of negative space, motivated practical lighting, decaying environment tells story without faces or gore. No anatomical issues, no AI artifacts, premium filmic grain and mood. Passes all rejection criteria.
metadata.movianx_integration_notes: Ideal for horror rail hero card or title detail page cinematic still. Strong emotional dread signal for recommendation engine.

metadata.title: The Weight of Silence
metadata.atmospheric_profile: oppressive domestic silence, guilt, peeling wallpaper, child's drawing, single practical lamp, unbearable negative space
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent. Heavy emotional weight through pure environment. Child's drawing and empty chair tell the entire story. No people, no artifacts, strong filmic low-key lighting. Passes all style bible criteria decisively.

metadata.title: The Quiet Frequency
metadata.atmospheric_profile: dreamlike, emotionally rhythmic, melancholic concert hall solitude, rain on glass, warm spotlight on lone grand piano, memory haze and bokeh city night
metadata.quality_notes: Beautiful, restrained, emotionally resonant. Perfect embodiment of music worlds ambient profile. Elegant minimalism, exquisite lighting, rain detail, bokeh, and mood. No people, pure atmosphere. Passes style bible and quality filter at highest level.
metadata.movianx_integration_notes: Ideal for music worlds rail, creator profile banner for Elias Voss, or ambient playlist visual. Strong emotional signature for recommendation and world-building.

metadata.title: Hidden Corner — Velvet Chair
metadata.atmospheric_profile: forgotten side room with red velvet chair, dusty light beam through arched window, scattered papers, quiet surreal beauty and hidden history
metadata.quality_notes: Beautiful atmospheric rail asset. Strong light, texture, and quiet mystery. Excellent support for Hidden Corners and Atmospheric Worlds rails.

metadata.title: The Last Summer We Spoke
metadata.atmospheric_profile: wooden porch railing at golden hour: glass of iced tea on a folded handwritten letter, white sheet on the line, long soft shadows, quiet space between people
metadata.quality_notes: Clean, text-free, emotionally precise rail thumbnail. Strong improvement and first real progress filling the thumbnails gap.

metadata.title: The Salt Line — Keep Out
metadata.atmospheric_profile: tight rail composition: heavily salt-encrusted wooden post with rusted 'KEEP OUT' sign half-buried in salt, cold flat light, immediate tactile dread
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent rail-optimized image. The rusted sign emerging from salt is instantly memorable and thematically perfect. Strong mood for discovery rail use.

metadata.title: The Record Shop at the End of the World
metadata.atmospheric_profile: wooden record store counter at dusk: hands holding a beautiful faded soul album, warm lamp light, rain on the window, stacks of vinyl with handwritten tags, pure analog connection
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent rail thumbnail. Rich textures, human hands, perfect nostalgic mood. First real progress on the critical thumbnails category.

metadata.title: The Record Shop at the End of the World
metadata.atmospheric_profile: wooden counter with spinning record on turntable, warm lamp, rain on window, old headphones, handwritten note 'For when you need it most' — tactile analog comfort and quiet human connection
metadata.quality_notes: Rich, emotionally resonant rail asset. Deepens Marcus Rivera's world with recurring turntable, rain, and handwritten notes. Excellent for Returning Tonight and Late Night Discoveries.
metadata.creator_continuity: Marcus Rivera - recurring turntable, rain, handwritten notes, warm lamp light

metadata.title: The Weight of Silence — Threshold
metadata.atmospheric_profile: tight rail composition: armchair with child's drawing and lamp, open door to pitch black hallway on the right, vertical tension, one light against overwhelming darkness
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent rail-optimized framing. The open door into blackness creates immediate dread and curiosity. Focal point (drawing + lamp) remains strong while adding narrative depth with the necklace detail. Consistent world tone, no repetition of poster composition.

metadata.title: The Last Summer We Spoke — The Letter
metadata.atmospheric_profile: kitchen table close-up: two glasses of iced tea, stack of old photographs, single handwritten letter with visible text 'I should have come home sooner...', lace curtain light, dust motes, quiet tenderness and time
metadata.quality_notes: Masterful emotional micro-storytelling. The visible letter text, iced tea, and light through lace create unbearable tenderness. Highest quality intimate drama still.

metadata.title: The Salt Line — Salt & Toy
metadata.atmospheric_profile: extreme tactile close-up: weathered wood encrusted with thick white salt crystals, tangled blue fishing net, cracked child's toy boat half-buried in salt
metadata.quality_notes: Masterful micro-detail. The salt crystals, net, and toy boat create a complete story of loss and reclamation. Hyper-tactile and emotionally heavy. Highest quality immersive still.

metadata.title: The Weight of Silence — The Letters
metadata.atmospheric_profile: intimate micro-detail of guilt: bundled unopened letters, dead moth, cold tea, dust in moonlight beam, handwritten confession fragment
metadata.quality_notes: Outstanding micro-storytelling. The half-pulled letter with visible text, the moth, dust motes, and cold tea create unbearable emotional residue. Rich textures, perfect motivated lighting. Highest level intimate atmospheric still.

metadata.title: Late Night Corridor
metadata.atmospheric_profile: long dim hallway in old building at night, single shoe under the light from a distant door, peeling wallpaper, quiet tension and hidden story
metadata.quality_notes: Strong atmospheric mystery thumbnail. Perfect mood for Late Night Discoveries and Hidden Corners. High cinematic quality.

metadata.title: The Last Summer We Spoke
metadata.atmospheric_profile: wooden windowsill at golden hour: handwritten letter, reading glasses, small vase with wilted flowers, warm light, quiet memory and tenderness
metadata.quality_notes: Excellent warm, intimate thumbnail. Perfect emotional tone for Quiet Hour and Stories That Linger rails. First wave of thumbnail density.

metadata.title: The Last Summer We Spoke
metadata.atmospheric_profile: worn wooden windowsill at dusk: handwritten letter tied with faded ribbon, old reading glasses, half-empty glass of water, soft golden-blue light, quiet waiting and memory
metadata.quality_notes: Exceptional quiet melancholy thumbnail. Strong emotional evidence of Lena Moreau's world — recurring motif of letters and light on wood. Perfect for Quiet Hour and Stories That Linger.
metadata.creator_continuity: Lena Moreau - recurring windowsill, letters, and late light

metadata.title: The Record Shop at the End of the World
metadata.atmospheric_profile: stack of used 7-inch singles on wooden counter, one sleeve slightly pulled out with faded artwork and handwritten price tag, warm lamp light, rain on window, analog comfort
metadata.quality_notes: Rich, tactile nostalgic thumbnail. Perfect for Late Night Discoveries and Returning Tonight rails. Strong analog soul.
